---
name: "🛡️ New safety rule"
about: Propose a malicious/risky pattern skillci should detect
title: "[rule] "
labels: ["safety-rule", "good first issue"]
---

**The risky pattern**
What should the rule catch? Paste an example of skill content that contains it.

**Why it's dangerous**
One or two sentences.

**Suggested severity**
error / warning / info

**Draft regex (optional)**
```
your-pattern-here
```

> Want to implement it yourself? It's ~6 lines of YAML in `rules/core.yml` plus a fixture line — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Great first PR.
